name: Floowandereeze and the Scary Sea
name_jp: ふわんだりぃずと<ruby lang="jp"><rb>怖</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こわ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>い<ruby lang="jp"><rb>海</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>うみ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: When your opponent would Special Summon a monster(s), while you control a face-up Tribute Summoned monster and no Special Summoned monsters: Negate the Summon, and if you do, return that monster(s) to the hand, also for the rest of this turn, your opponent cannot Special Summon, and can conduct up to 3 Normal Summons/Sets this turn, not just 1. You can only activate 1 "Floowandereeze and the Scary Sea" per turn.
eff: When your opponent would Special Summon a monster(s), while you control a face-up Tribute Summoned monster and no Special Summoned monsters: Negate the Summon, and if you do, return that monster(s) to the hand, also for the rest of this turn, your opponent cannot Special Summon, and can conduct up to 3 Normal Summons/Sets this turn, not just 1. You can only activate 1 "Floowandereeze and the Scary Sea" per turn.
